title: LibPow
description: A flavoured energy API for Fabric
body:
This mod adds in support for the creation of energy systems like RF, EU, and even more exotic ones like Create's rotational energy. It also defines a FE-like energy system called Pows, which act as a sort-of "universal" unit of energy.

Most users should not have to install this, as mod jars should include a copy if possible.
